mapper.select: SELECT id, match_id AS matchId, sport_type AS sportType, sport_type_name AS sportTypeName, match_name AS matchName, player_id AS playerId, player_name AS playerName, jersey_number AS jerseyNumber, team_id AS teamId, team_name AS teamName, status, status_name AS statusName, play_time AS playTime, play_time_display AS playTimeDisplay, goals, assists, yellow_cards AS yellowCards, red_cards AS redCards, fouls, performance_score AS performanceScore FROM v_match_player_performance WHERE match_id = #{matchId} ORDER BY performance_score DESC

SELECT id, match_id AS matchId, sport_type AS sportType, player_id AS playerId, status, play_time AS playTime, create_time AS createTime, update_time AS updateTime FROM match_player WHERE match_id = #{matchId} ORDER BY status ASC, id ASC
SELECT id, match_id AS matchId, sport_type AS sportType, player_id AS playerId, status, play_time AS playTime, create_time AS createTime, update_time AS updateTime FROM match_player WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO match_player (match_id, sport_type, player_id, status, play_time) VALUES (#{matchId}, #{sportType}, #{playerId}, #{status}, #{playTime})
